name: Story Highlight Sequence (SP Our Mission-inspired, 7 stories)
description: Highlight permanente em narrativa cinematográfica de 7 stories conectados. Modelado em @superpowerapp 'Our Mission' highlight. Aprovado pelo Matheus em 17/mai/2026 — story 1 v3 'agora sim ficou pica'.
performance_target: highlight permanente — não viral; long-term brand asset

background_rules: REAL fluorescence microscopy (GFP-stained look) — não painterly, não watercolor, não macro earth, não cell illustration
Cinematic diagonal composition: cells cluster densely in TOP-RIGHT 60% of canvas
Center-left should have NATURAL DARK ZONE (pure forest #000F08) for typography
Real depth-of-field — some cells sharp, others soft/blurred
Visible cell anatomy: membrane, nucleus, mitochondria dots, tubulin/actin filaments

typography.label_caps: DM Sans Regular 400, uppercase, letter-spacing +0.18em, off-white #f8fffc, single line, ~24px
typography.frame_number: DM Sans Regular 400, ~14px, gold #C89136, top-left corner [01]/[02]/etc
typography.single_font_rule: ONLY DM Sans — NEVER serif (Georgia/Source Serif/Times)

layout.vertical_48_pct_right_55_pct_horizontal: logo Longevify wordmark (overlay in post-processing, 26% canvas width)
layout.bottom_18_pct: clean forest #000F08 reserved for Instagram UI

narrative_sequence.background_focus: fluorescent cells cluster right, dark void left
same microscopy continues — slightly different cell cluster, maybe sharper

narrative_sequence.background_aesthetic_override: DIFFERENT — chaotic red/dark organic texture, NOT cells. Inflammation aesthetic.

narrative_sequence.body_message: Construir um modelo melhor de saúde — e torná-lo acessível a quem decide enxergar.

narrative_sequence.background_aesthetic_override: blood smear macro OR pill capsule close-up
natural BR scene — onda do Atlântico, floresta, ou paisagem Mantiqueira

narrative_sequence.subtitle: O que está incluso
narrative_sequence.background_aesthetic_override: forest dark with subtle gold particles

voice_rules.italic_rule: italic em 1 palavra-pivô por frame (asteriscos no prompt → italic via Higgsfield)

production_workflow: 1. Higgsfield text-to-image em 9:16 com template visual locked
3. (P2) Animar com seedance_2_0 image-to-video pra criar versão vídeo cinematográfica em loop
4. Upload sequência no Instagram (Stories → Highlights → save permanent)
frequency_recommendation: Highlight permanente — gera 1x, atualiza a cada 6 meses se posicionamento evoluir
